problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: If Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations is applied to chemistry, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
